name: project-blueprint-engine
description: A Codex plugin that turns user intent into traceable Product, Project, Work, and Test trees, then controls staged execution, evidence, review, feedback, and revision through compatible PBE contracts.

interface.shortDescription: Tree-based product blueprint, execution, evidence, and revision control for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Project Blueprint Engine runs inside Codex as a tree-based development control workflow while preserving the existing RPD, WPD, VD, and ACEP compatibility terms. It grows product intent into a Product Tree, derives Project, Work, and Test views, routes active PBE work through state-aware gates before ordinary coding, confirms UI/UX before implementation, audits dependency impact before implementation scope, selects staged execution slices, validates schema and cross-artifact traceability, tracks evidence, stops for user review, maps feedback to affected nodes, and creates bounded revision work through change and impact analysis.
